paras: Brynja Ashbow was raised among the Hrafnir, a people of trackers and outriders who range the wooded marches where the mortal world thins against the Feywild.

As a child she wandered too far along a deer trail and crossed, without knowing it, into the realm beyond. She came back a day later by her own reckoning — a full season by everyone else's — carrying a quiet that never quite left her.
The fey took a liking to her. Their glamour clings to her still: strangers trust her too quickly, animals come when she calls, and a faint silver shimmer haunts the edge of her sight.
She works now as a guide and hunter for hire, following trails others lose. The wilds hold few secrets from her, and she has learned to turn the fey's gifts of charm and misdirection to her own ends.
Lately the boundaries have grown thin again, and things are crossing over that should not. Brynja means to find out why — and to be the one waiting when they do.

items.html: Species: Human — Resourceful, Skillful (+1 skill), Versatile (+1 Origin feat), Speed 30
Ability scores: Str 8, Dex 17, Con 13, Int 10, Wis 15, Cha 12 (standard array 15/14/13/12/10/8; background +2 Dex / +1 Wis)
Favored Enemy: Hunter's Mark always prepared, free casts = proficiency / long rest
Background: Guide — Origin feat Magic Initiate (Druid); skills Stealth & Survival; Cartographer's Tools; +2 Dex / +1 Wis
Magic Initiate (Druid): Guidance & Produce Flame cantrips, Faerie Fire (Wis casting)
Dreadful Strikes — +1d4 psychic on a weapon hit
Otherworldly Glamour: +Wis to Charisma checks · proficiency in Persuasion
Human Versatile Origin feat — to place (Lucky, Alert, Tough, or Savage Attacker)
Took the ASI rather than a feat for the level-4 slot

longbow.title: Longbow
body: One attack on your turn (Extra Attack arrives at level 5). +8 to hit = Dex +4, proficiency +2, and the Archery fighting style +2. Damage adds your Dexterity (+4).
Slow (mastery): when you hit and deal damage, the target's Speed drops by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.
Needs ammunition and two free hands to fire.

shortsword.title: Shortsword
body: Your melee sidearm. Finesse lets you use Dexterity for attack and damage, so +6 to hit (Dex +4, proficiency +2) and 1d6+4.
Vex (mastery): when you hit and deal damage, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that target, until the end of your next turn.

dreadful.title: Dreadful Strikes
body: Once per turn, when you hit a creature with a weapon, you can deal an extra 1d4 psychic damage. Each creature can take this extra damage only once per turn.
It costs no action and stacks with Hunter's Mark; the die grows to 1d6 at ranger level 11.
It isn't magical and needs no Concentration — it simply rides your hits.

huntersmark.title: Hunter's Mark
body: As a Bonus Action, mark a creature you can see. Until your Concentration ends (up to 1 hour), your weapon attacks against it deal an extra 1d6 force damage.
When the target drops, move the mark to a new creature as a Bonus Action.
Favored Enemy keeps it always prepared and lets you cast it free (no slot) twice per long rest (your Proficiency Bonus); after that, cast it with a slot. Tap Use below to spend a free cast.

spellslots.title: Spell Slots (Level 1)
body: You have three 1st-level spell slots, regained on a long rest. As a half-caster you only have 1st-level slots at level 4 — 2nd-level slots arrive at level 5.
Spell save DC 12 (8 + Wis +2 + prof +2); spell attack +4. Tap Use below to spend a slot.

inspiration.title: Heroic Inspiration
body: When you have Heroic Inspiration you can expend it to reroll any d20 and use either roll. You can hold only one at a time.
Your Human Resourceful trait grants it after every long rest; the GM may also award it for great play.

charmperson.title: Charm Person
body: One humanoid within 30 ft makes a Wisdom save (DC 12) or is Charmed by you for 1 hour or until you or your allies harm it. It saves with Advantage if you're already fighting it.
A Charmed creature can't attack you and treats you as a friendly acquaintance. Always prepared by Fey Wanderer.

curewounds.title: Cure Wounds
body: Touch a creature to restore 2d8 + your spellcasting modifier (Wis +2) hit points. A higher-level slot heals an extra 2d8 per level. No effect on Undead or Constructs.

goodberry.title: Goodberry
body: Create up to ten berries. Eating one (a Bonus Action) restores 1 hit point, and a berry feeds a creature for a day. They lose potency after 24 hours.
Ten guaranteed HP in one-point bites — best out of combat.

longstrider.title: Longstrider
body: Touch a creature; its Speed increases by 10 feet for 1 hour. A higher-level slot affects one extra creature per level.

ensnaringstrike.title: Ensnaring Strike
body: As a Bonus Action, the next time you hit with a weapon this turn the target makes a Strength save (DC 12) or is Restrained by magical vines, taking 1d6 piercing at the start of each of its turns. It can repeat the save to break free.
Requires Concentration, so it competes with Hunter's Mark.

speakwithanimals.title: Speak with Animals
body: You can comprehend and verbally communicate with Beasts for 10 minutes. As a ritual you can cast it without a slot if you spend 10 extra minutes.
Pairs naturally with Animal Handling for a fey-touched tracker.

fogcloud.title: Fog Cloud
body: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog within 120 ft; the area is Heavily Obscured. Wind disperses it, and a higher-level slot makes it larger.
A getaway or reposition tool — it blocks line of sight for everyone.

entangle.title: Entangle
body: Grasping weeds and vines sprout in a 20-foot square within 90 ft. Each creature there makes a Strength save (DC 12) or is Restrained for the duration; the area is also Difficult Terrain.
A Restrained creature can use its action to make a Strength check to free itself. Concentration, so it competes with Hunter's Mark.

detectmagic.title: Detect Magic
body: For the duration you sense the presence of magic within 30 ft. As an action you can see a faint aura around any visible magical creature or object and learn its school of magic.
Has the Ritual tag, but rangers lack a Ritual Casting feature, so cast it with a slot (or your free prepared casting).

asi.title: Level 4 — Ability Score Improvement
body: You raised Dexterity from 17 to 19 (+4). That sharpened your attack and damage bonuses, AC, Initiative, and Dexterity saves.
A feat was the alternative; you also still have the Human Versatile Origin feat to place.

favoredenemy.title: Favored Enemy
body: You always have Hunter's Mark prepared, and you can cast it without a spell slot a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus (2) per long rest. After that, cast it with a slot.
This is your signature damage rider — turn it on as a Bonus Action at the start of a fight.

archery.title: Fighting Style: Archery
body: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons. Already included in the longbow's +8 to hit.

deftexplorer.title: Deft Explorer
body: You gain Expertise in one skill — taken in Stealth, doubling your Proficiency Bonus there (Stealth +8). You also learn two additional languages.
Move the Expertise onto Perception instead if you'd rather have Passive Perception 16.

glamour.title: Otherworldly Glamour
body: Whenever you make a Charisma check, add your Wisdom modifier (minimum +1) — here +2. You also gain proficiency in one of Deception, Performance, or Persuasion — taken in Persuasion.
This makes a Charisma-12 ranger a strong talker: Persuasion is +5 (Cha +1, prof +2, glamour +2).

resourceful.title: Human: Resourceful
body: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a long rest, if you don't already have it. Spend it to reroll a d20.

skillful.title: Human: Skillful
body: You gain proficiency in one additional skill from any list. Taken in Animal Handling (Stealth and Survival come from the Guide background; Insight is one of your Ranger skill picks).

magicinitiate.title: Magic Initiate (Druid)
body: From the Druid list you learn two cantrips (Guidance and Produce Flame) and one level-1 spell (Faerie Fire). Wisdom is the spellcasting ability, so the numbers match your ranger casting: save DC 12, spell attack +4.
You can cast Faerie Fire once per long rest without a slot, and also with your ranger spell slots. Cantrips are at-will.
Granted by the Guide background — confirm the cantrip and spell picks with your table.

guidance.title: Guidance
body: Touch a willing creature; once before the spell ends (up to 1 minute) it can roll 1d4 and add it to one ability check of its choice. Requires Concentration.

produceflame.title: Produce Flame
body: A flame in your hand sheds Bright Light (10 ft) and Dim Light (another 10 ft) for 10 minutes. You can hurl it as a ranged spell attack (to 30 ft) for 1d8 fire damage; the die grows at higher levels.
A handy light source and a backup ranged option when a bow won't serve.

faeriefire.title: Faerie Fire
body: Each creature in a 20-foot cube must succeed on a Dexterity save (DC 12) or be outlined in light for 1 minute. Attack rolls against an outlined creature have Advantage, and it can't benefit from being Invisible.
Concentration, so it competes with Hunter's Mark. From Magic Initiate you can cast it free once per long rest, or with a slot. Tap Use below to spend the free cast.

versatile.title: Human: Versatile
body: You gain one Origin feat of your choice, on top of the Magic Initiate (Druid) feat from your Guide background. Strong picks for Brynja: Lucky, Alert, Tough, or Savage Attacker. Not yet placed — choose one and it goes here.
It can re-take Magic Initiate only with a different spell list; otherwise pick a new feat.

hitdice.title: Hit Dice
body: During a short rest you can spend Hit Dice to heal, rolling 1d10+1 each (1d10 + your Constitution modifier). You regain spent Hit Dice on a long rest.
Tap Spend Hit Die to mark one used, then roll and apply it with Heal.

stat_init.title: Initiative
body: Initiative equals your Dexterity modifier (+4).
If you place the Alert Origin feat from Human Versatile, you would add your Proficiency Bonus too (+6).

stat_speed.title: Speed
body: Your walking speed is 30 feet. Studded leather is light armor, so it doesn't slow you.
Longstrider can add 10 feet for an hour.

stat_prof.title: Proficiency Bonus
body: Your proficiency bonus is +2 at character levels 1–4. It rises to +3 at level 5.
It is added to attack rolls, saves, skills you're proficient in, your spell save DC, and your spell attack bonus.

stat_pass.title: Passive Perception
body: Passive Perception = 10 + your Perception check modifier.
Perception is +4 (Wis +2, proficiency +2), so 14. If you moved your Deft Explorer Expertise onto Perception, this would be 16.

guide.title: Background: Guide
body: A life spent leading travelers through trackless wilds. Guide grants the Magic Initiate (Druid) Origin feat, proficiency in Stealth and Survival, proficiency with Cartographer's Tools, and the +2 Dexterity / +1 Wisdom that shaped your scores.

moves.label: Cast Faerie Fire
moves.detail: Dex save DC 12 · Adv. to hit them

moves.label: Cast Fog Cloud / Entangle / Cure Wounds
Hunter’s Mark
moves.detail: +1d6 force/hit · move it on a kill

moves.label: Ensnaring Strike
moves.detail: next hit: Str save DC 12 or Restrained

moves.label: Opportunity Attack
moves.detail: when a foe leaves your reach
